case_title: CATERINA HARRIS EARL VS. UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-08-2024, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY HARRIS EARL, CATERINA UNITED AIRLINES, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE AMANDA GARCIA - CT CORPORATION SYSTEM] FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARRIS EARL, CATERINA AS TO DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CATERINA HARRIS EARL IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-03-2024 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CATERINA HARRIS EARL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UNITED AIRLINES IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STACEY MACIAS. BOTH PARTIES STATED THEY HAD REACHED AN AGREEMENT AND WOULD LIKE A PROGRESS REPORT DATE. MATTER IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE IF NO APPEARANCES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CURTIS SMOLAR; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
